name: Triage
description: Digital forensic triage is a partial forensic examination conducted under (significant) time and resource constraints [DFCite-1115].
details: Involves the ranking of apprehended digital items in terms of their importance to a case and likelihood that they contain the data required [DFCite-1131]. It can involve multiple techniques to identify devices of most interest such as keyword searching, hash matching, media review etc.

references.relevance_summary_280: Defines the triage framework and real-time forensics approach this technique is based on
Describes how triage involves ranking digital items by importance and likelihood of containing required data
